title: Adopt IHttpClientFactory in RestMemoryGateway with Resilience Policies
description:
Research Report R1-014 (Confidence 87%, High). RestMemoryGateway is instantiated with new HttpClient() in DI, bypassing IHttpClientFactory. This risks socket exhaustion under concurrent load.

Fix:
1. Register RestMemoryGateway via IHttpClientFactory in Program.cs
2. Add resilience policies (retry with exponential backoff, circuit breaker) via Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Resilience or Polly
3. Configure timeout and connection lifetime

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Sprint-35 Code Audit, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
